title: flemingia rollae
intro: Flemingia rollae, also known as the Hong Kong tea, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Flemingia rollae include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a diuretic to aid in urinary problems. Flemingia rollae can be prepared as a tea or decoction for its medicinal benefits, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestive health and relieve menstrual cramps.
